explanation: The original rule is case-sensitive for the 'selection\_keyword' section (unless the SIEM backend is configured for case-insensitivity by default). By changing the casing of the keyword (e.g., 'CVE-' to 'cve-'), the 'contains' match may fail. This specific command uses the lowercase 'cve' which would bypass a strict case-sensitive match for 'CVE-'.
